case_title: TAMARAS SUPPLY, INC. VS. NORCAL JANITORIAL, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DEOS 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE
